allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Dark mode refinement, performance, mobile nav auto-hide, and chart fixes' --body ':*)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: always initialize locale Select with a valid fallback value:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: detect API errors and delay reload so language save works correctly:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(i18n\): translate all page titles, section headings, and dashboard components:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(i18n\): translate accounts list — select all, add item/account, assets/liabilities, category labels, plural counts:*)

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql://ci:ci@localhost:5432/ci" AUTH_SECRET="ci-secret-placeholder-not-real" AUTH_GOOGLE_ID="ci-google-id" AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET="ci-google-secret" CRON_SECRET="ci-cron-secret" npm run build)
